activities.name: Meiji Shrine
activities.why: Avoid crowds by visiting early in the morning

activities.name: Tsukiji Outer Market
activities.why: Fresh sushi and seafood are best enjoyed in the morning

activities.name: Shibuya Crossing
activities.why: Experience the famous scramble crossing at night

activities.name: Senso-ji Temple
activities.why: Explore the historic temple and surrounding Nakamise shopping street

activities.name: Imperial Palace
activities.why: Take a stroll around the beautiful palace grounds

activities.name: Fushimi Inari Shrine
activities.why: Hike the famous orange torii gate trail

activities.name: Arashiyama Bamboo Grove
activities.why: Take a peaceful walk through the bamboo forest

activities.name: Nijo Castle
activities.why: Explore the historic castle and its 'nightingale floors'

warnings: Plan based on model knowledge; not verified against live sources.
